metadata.title: Another Quick Switcher
metadata.description: This is an Obsidian plugin which is another choice of Quick switcher.

regex.source: .setName("Use selection words as a default input query")
regex.target: .setName("使用选择的文字作为默认输入查询")

regex.source: .setName("Display alias as title on keyword match")
regex.target: .setName("当关键词匹配别名时显示别名为标题")
.setName('允许对 "搜索目标" 进行模糊搜索')
.setName('排除前缀路径模式用于 "反向链接搜索"')
.setName("匹配词周围的最大显示长度")

regex.source: .setName('Exclude prefix path patterns for "Move file to another folder"')
regex.target: .setName('排除前缀路径模式用于 "将文件移动到另一个文件夹"')

regex.source: .setName("Show log about performance in a console")
.setName("Show fuzzy match score in the dialog")
regex.target: .setName("在对话框中显示模糊匹配得分")

regex.source: .setDesc("If keyboard operation is slow, try increasing the value")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果键盘操作缓慢，尝试增加该值")

regex.source: .setDesc("Click the button to enable/disable the search target")
regex.target: .setDesc("点击按钮来启用/禁用搜索目标")

regex.source: .setDesc("Multiple entries can be specified, separated by line breaks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("可以指定多个条目，使用换行符分隔.")

regex.source: .setDesc("It can set multi patterns by line breaks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("可以使用换行符设置多个模式.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Default input strings when it opens the dialog")
regex.target: .setDesc("打开对话框时的默认输入字符串")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder(`Search around the vault by ${inst == null ? void 0 : inst.command} key`)
regex.target: .setPlaceholder(`通过${inst == null ? void 0 : inst.command}键在Vault中搜索`)
.setPlaceholder("输入任意内容然后显示结果")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Delete a command (!! it will never be restored !!)")
regex.target: .setTooltip("删除命令 (!! 它将无法恢复 !!)")
.createEl("h2", { text: "另一个快速切换器 - 设置" })

regex.source: .createEl("h3", { text: "\u{1F4C1} Move file to another folder" })
regex.target: .createEl("h3", { text: "\u{1F4C1} 将文件移动到另一个文件夹" })
name: "文件内的浮动标题搜索"

regex.source: name: "Reveal a folder in the file tree"
regex.target: name: "在文件树中显示文件夹"
name: "将文件移动到另一个文件夹"
在新的水平窗格中打开
在新的垂直窗格中打开

regex.source: open in new tab in background
regex.target: 在后台的新标签页中打开
在新标签页中全部打开
在系统资源管理器中显示
